- `m == grid.length`
- `n == grid[i].length`
- `1 <= m, n <= 50`
- `1 <= grid[i][j] <= 100`

- `0 <= y < n`

    submatrix_rows = grid[x..x + k -1].map { |row| row[y..y + k] }
    reversed_rows = submatrix_rows.reverse
    for i in 0..k-1
        original_row = grid[x + i].copy
        original_row[y..y + k] = reversed_rows[i]
        grid[x + i] = original_row
    end
    return grid
end

  submatrix_rows = grid[x ... x + k].map { |row| row[y ... y + k] }

end
